summary: Completed testing of MomManager 2026 app. All 12 backend/code structure tests passed. Frontend landing page loads correctly with proper branding, features list, and Google OAuth login.

issues: Minor: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warning in console - should use 'boxShadow'

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features verified: Kitchen scanner section, kids.tsx no kid_name, settings subscription fix, organize dynamic theme, AI chat direct instructions

success_rate.frontend: 100% (landing page loads, auth required for inner screens)

seed_data_creation: None - testing does not require seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 test requirements from review_request passed. Backend tests verify: 1) /api/health returns 200, 2) /api/kitchen/generate-meals-from-image endpoint exists and accepts image_base64+language, 3) AI chat validates message field. Code structure tests verify: 4) kids.tsx generateStory no kid_name, 5) settings.tsx monthly has trial/yearly no trial, 6) organize.tsx uses dynamic theme, 7) AI chat has Romanian 'Răspunde DIRECT', 8) AI chat has English 'Answer DIRECTLY', 9) dashboard has only settings icon, 10) kitchen.tsx has scanner section with data-testids. Frontend loads correctly showing MomManager 2026 landing page with Google OAuth.

tests_verified.kitchen_accepts_fields: PASS - Accepts image_base64 and language fields
tests_verified.kids_no_kid_name: PASS - generateStory() only sends age_group, themes, language
tests_verified.settings_subscription_fix: PASS - Monthly has freeTrial, Yearly does not
tests_verified.organize_dynamic_theme: PASS - Uses colors: C from useSettings()
tests_verified.ai_chat_romanian_direct: PASS - Has 'Răspunde DIRECT' in system prompt
tests_verified.ai_chat_english_direct: PASS - Has 'Answer DIRECTLY' in system prompt
tests_verified.dashboard_no_toggle: PASS - Only settings icon, no Day/Night toggle button
tests_verified.kitchen_scanner_section: PASS - Has data-testid scan-camera-btn, scan-gallery-btn, generate-meal-plan-btn
